name: Weekly Review & Planning
description: Review your week and plan the next one

agents.name: Week Reviewer
agents.purpose: Analyze what was accomplished and what needs attention
agents.system_prompt_hint: Review the past week's accomplishments and challenges. Identify what went well, what didn't, and lessons learned.

agents.name: Week Planner
agents.purpose: Plan priorities and goals for the coming week
agents.system_prompt_hint: Based on the review, plan the coming week. Set 3-5 priority goals. Identify key meetings and deadlines. Suggest focus areas for each day.

suggestion_card.title: Weekly Review
suggestion_card.subtitle: Reflect on your week and plan ahead
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Review my week and plan next week: [accomplishments and upcoming tasks]

author: agentfactory
